{"method":"item/completed","params":{"item":{"type":"agentMessage","id":"msg_01971c3053110a5a0169e4c92d63cc8191af17eacfc00205bd","text":"{\"evaluation\":null,\"question\":{\"concept_tags\":[\"matrix multiplication\",\"row-by-column product\",\"linear models foundations\"],\"matrix_dimensions\":{\"cols\":2,\"rows\":2},\"prompt\":\"Without notes, compute the product \\\\(AB\\\\).\\n\\n\\\\[\\nA=\\\\begin{bmatrix}2 & -1 & 3\\\\\\\\0 & 4 & 1\\\\end{bmatrix},\\\\qquad\\nB=\\\\begin{bmatrix}1 & 2\\\\\\\\3 & -1\\\\\\\\2 & 0\\\\end{bmatrix}\\n\\\\]\\n\\nEnter the full \\\\(2\\\\times 2\\\\) result.\",\"title\":\"Matrix Product Recall\",\"widget_kind\":\"matrix_grid\"},\"session_plan\":{\"core_targets\":[\"Rebuild fast recall for matrix multiplication.\",\"Link matrix operations to the structure used in linear models.\",\"Check accuracy first, then speed on a second pass.\"],\"recommended_duration_minutes\":45,\"stretch_target\":\"After the warmup, shift to interpreting matrix products as linear combinations and model mappings.\",\"warm_up_questions\":[\"Can you predict the output shape before multiplying?\",\"What does one entry of a product matrix represent?\"],\"why_now\":\"No repair queue is active, so this session should sharpen core fluency before moving into linear model structure.\",\"window\":null},\"teaching_blocks\":[{\"text\":\"Start cold. Do the retrieval first, then check your method.\",\"type\":\"paragraph\"},{\"body\":\"Call the shape before you multiply: \\\\((2\\\\times 3)(3\\\\times 2)\\\\to(2\\\\times 2)\\\\).
